Norway  Period fertility rates by calendar year and age (1846 - 1967: age reached during the year (ARDY); 1967 - 2022: Lexis squares  age in completed years (ACY))		
1846 - 1967: Data from Burnborg & Mamalund (1994). Kohort og periodefruktbarhet I Norge 1820-1993: Statistics Norway; 1967 - 2022 Human Fertility Database. MPIDR & VID (data downloaded 02.08.2023)
